name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Potential Initial Access Tasks
notes: This Building Block defines potential initial access tasks. This includes activities such as: account discovery, stopping firewall, or changing permissions.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Cloud Firewall Modified or Stopped
BB:BehaviorDefinition: Email Account Discovery from Powershell
BB:BehaviorDefinition: Potential Initial Access Tasks on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Changing of User Agent
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Cloud Firewall Modified or Stopped, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Windows Firewall Stopped, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Outbound SMTP Connections, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Changing of User Agent, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Create Process with Token, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Cloud Account Discovery, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Email Account Discovery from Powershell, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Mailbox Permission Added, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Rogue Named Pipe Impersonation
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Potential Initial Access Tasks on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Cloud Firewall Modified or Stopped, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Windows Firewall Stopped, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Outbound SMTP Connections, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Changing of User Agent, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Create Process with Token, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Cloud Account Discovery, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Email Account Discovery from Powershell, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Mailbox Permission Added, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Rogue Named Pipe Impersonation
